message:
style: remove unused HashSet import in bridge.rs, rustfmt local_queue.rs

- distributed/bridge.rs: Remove stale std::collections::HashSet import that
  is no longer needed after the BTreeSet migration
- runtime/scheduler/local_queue.rs: Reformat schedule_local() chain and test
  assertion for rustfmt compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
